_meta.title: Bundled sample lab reports — drive the offline demo and the eval harness
_meta.note: Each sample carries the raw report text (as the Parser agent would receive it), the metadata printed on the report, and a labelled expected verdict for the evaluation harness.

samples.title: Arsenic-contaminated groundwater — Patna, Bihar
samples.subtitle: Hand-pump sample · the classic Gangetic-plain arsenic case
samples.text:
WATER QUALITY TEST REPORT
Lab: Bihar State Water Testing Laboratory
Sample ID: BR-PAT-22418
Location: Kankarbagh, Patna  Pincode: 800001
Date of Collection: 14-03-2025
Source: Hand pump (borewell)

Parameter                 Result      Unit
pH value                  7.4
Turbidity                 0.8         NTU
Total Dissolved Solids    612         mg/L
Total Hardness            240         mg/L
Chloride                  140         mg/L
Fluoride                  0.6         mg/L
Nitrate                   12          mg/L
Arsenic                   0.032       mg/L
Iron                      0.45        mg/L
Lead                      0.004       mg/L
Total Coliform            0           MPN/100mL
E. coli                   0           MPN/100mL

samples.title: High fluoride + nitrate — Jodhpur, Rajasthan
samples.subtitle: Desert-belt well · fluorosis country
samples.text:
DRINKING WATER ANALYSIS REPORT
Lab: Rajasthan PHED Regional Lab, Jodhpur
Sample No: RJ-JOD-1187
Village/Area: Mandore   PIN: 342001
Collected: 02/02/2025
Source: Community open well

Test Parameter            Observed Value   Units
pH                        7.9
Turbidity                 1.4              NTU
TDS                       1180             mg/L
Total Hardness (as CaCO3) 480              mg/L
Chloride                  320              mg/L
Fluoride (as F)           2.1              mg/L
Nitrate (as NO3)          52               mg/L
Sulphate                  210              mg/L
Arsenic                   0.003            mg/L
Iron                      0.2              mg/L

samples.title: Bacterial contamination — Delhi municipal supply
samples.subtitle: Tap sample after a supply-line break · faecal indicators present
samples.text:
MUNICIPAL WATER TEST CERTIFICATE
Lab: Delhi Jal Board Quality Control
Sample Ref: DJB-CP-90233
Sampling Point: Domestic tap, CP area, New Delhi - 110001
Date: 10 June 2025

Parameter                 Value     Unit
pH                        7.6
Turbidity                 6.2       NTU
Total Dissolved Solids    380       mg/L
Residual Free Chlorine    0.0       mg/L
Total Coliform            18        MPN/100mL
E. coli                   8         MPN/100mL
Fluoride                  0.5       mg/L
Nitrate                   9         mg/L
Arsenic                   0.001     mg/L

samples.title: Clean treated supply — passes BIS

samples.text:

Location: Sector 21 RWA, Gurugram  PIN: 122001
Collected on: 21-05-2025

Total Hardness            150       mg/L
Chloride                  120       mg/L
Fluoride                  0.6       mg/L
Nitrate                   10        mg/L
Arsenic                   0.002     mg/L
Iron                      0.1       mg/L
Lead                      0.002     mg/L
Residual Free Chlorine    0.3       mg/L
Total Coliform            0         MPN/100mL
E. coli                   0         MPN/100mL
